content: Enterprise AI pilot failures: >80% stall between PoC and production; governance assembled reactively fails compliance review late; adoption fails when employees perceive surveillance/job-cut framing; KM registries decay into low-quality dumps without curation standards; review bottlenecks when approval workflow is under-resourced; scope creep from scoped pilot to org-wide rollout kills trust. Sources: CIO Dive, EPAM, Forbes, Interact, sidgs.
